  • Method Details

    • setupFollowers

      public static void setupFollowers(yams.motorcontrollers.SmartMotorControllerConfig motorConfig, MotorSetupJson motorSetup)
      Configures the followers of the given SmartMotorControllerConfig with the followers from the given MotorSetupJson.
      Parameters:
      motorConfig - the SmartMotorControllerConfig to configure
      motorSetup - the MotorSetupJson from which to get the followers
